items.title: Numbers, NaN and precision: reject the invalid model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this JavaScript: Language and Browser Applications misconception? All decimal arithmetic is exact because number displays familiar decimal text.
hints: Compare both options with platform semantics and observable user or browser evidence.

feedback.incorrect: That preserves the misconception. Binary floating-point decimals can round; use tolerance or domain-appropriate decimal representation.
